signals.raw:

signals.headline: Wembanyama Enters Concussion Protocol After Game 2 Exit vs
signals.raw:
Wembanyama Enters Concussion Protocol After Game 2 Exit vs. Trail Blazers | YES | HIGH confidence**
San Antonio's MVP finalist and star Victor Wembanyama exited Game 2 against Portland and was ruled out after a hard fall, entering concussion protocol[4]. His status for Game 3 remains uncertain, which impacts the Spurs' title contention despite their strong regular season (62-20 record)[3].
